title: Lissochilus vaginatus
taxonomy: Lissochilus vaginatus is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Lissochilus, which is a group of orchids commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The Orchidaceae family is one of the largest and most diverse families of flowering plants. Lissochilus vaginatus is native to Africa, specifically in tropical and subtropical areas. The classification of Lissochilus vaginatus reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the Orchidaceae family.
